summary: SEO FAQ & References Page testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly. FAQ section displays on homepage with collapsible questions, FAQPage JSON-LD schema markup present in DOM, admin UKK tab allows CRUD operations, /referenssit page loads with ItemList schema.
passed_tests: GET /api/faqs returns list of 4 FAQs
FAQs have required fields (id, question, answer, order)
FAQs sorted by order field
Admin login with correct credentials
Admin can view FAQs via GET /api/admin/faqs
Admin can create new FAQ via POST /api/admin/faqs
Admin can update FAQ via PUT /api/admin/faqs/{id}
Admin can delete FAQ via DELETE /api/admin/faqs/{id}
CRUD operations without auth return 401
GET /api/references returns list of 6 references
References have required fields for display
Only published references returned to public
FAQ data suitable for FAQPage schema
Homepage loads with FAQ section visible
FAQ section has 4 collapsible question items
FAQ expand/collapse functionality works (aria-expanded toggle)
FAQPage JSON-LD schema found in homepage DOM
Schema contains @type: Question items
Schema contains acceptedAnswer structure
/referenssit page loads correctly
/referenssit page title contains 'Referenssit'
/referenssit page has H1 'Referenssit'
/referenssit displays 6 reference cards
ItemList JSON-LD schema found on /referenssit
Schema contains ListItem elements
'Takaisin etusivulle' back link present
Admin UKK tab shows all 4 FAQs
Admin UKK has edit/delete icons per FAQ
Admin UKK has '+ Lisää kysymys' button
FAQ section positioned after References on homepage
critical_code_review_comments: FAQSection component correctly generates FAQPage JSON-LD schema for SEO
FAQ collapsible accordion implementation using Framer Motion is smooth
ReferencesPage includes ItemList schema for structured data
Admin panel UKK tab provides full CRUD functionality
FAQ API endpoints properly protected with authentication
seed_data_creation: 4 sample FAQs were pre-seeded by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: FAQ and References features fully tested and working. Homepage shows FAQ section with FAQPage schema after References. /referenssit page displays all references with ItemList schema. Admin UKK tab allows managing FAQs. All API endpoints (GET /api/faqs, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/faqs) working correctly.

faq_section_homepage.details: 4 FAQs displayed with collapsible questions/answers, FAQPage JSON-LD in DOM

faq_admin_crud.details: View, create, update, delete all working via API and admin panel

referenssit_page.details: Loads at /referenssit with 6 references, ItemList schema, SEO title

api_endpoints.details: GET /api/faqs, POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/faqs all return correct responses
